description: Sample discount approval request for evaluation testing

payload.discount_justification: Competitive pressure from rival vendor offering 30% below our list price

_evaluation_notes: SAL-001: 25% discount exceeds 15% standard limit, requires Sales Director approval (current approver is Sales Manager) - VIOLATION
SAL-005: 24-month term with auto_renewal=true violates sunset clause requirement - VIOLATION
SAL-003: competitive_bid_conducted=false, no documentation of selection criteria - NEEDS_REVIEW
